channel.title: Prog. Mater. Sci.
channel.description: Filtered papers from Prog. Mater. Sci.

item.title: Machine Learning in Aerogels: From Performance Analytics to Design Optimization and Property Prediction
item.description:
Publication date: November 2026

Source: Progress in Materials Science, Volume 162

Author(s): Zahra Amiri, Omid Aghababaei Tafreshi, Hangyu Song, Zia Saadatnia, Chul B. Park, Hani E. Naguib
